# R0 action combat plan fixture (synthetic gap analysis)

## Genre
action_combat soulslike melee prototype

## SSOT
| State | Owner |
|-------|-------|
| HP/Stamina | USoulsCombatComponent |
| Input | ASoulsPlayerCharacter + DefaultInput.ini |
| GameMode spawn | ASoulsGameModeBase |

## Impacted files (slices)
1. SoulsPlayerCharacter.cpp/.h: fix LookXY camera and unify input.
2. Config/DefaultGame.ini: set ASoulsGameModeBase and DefaultPawnClass.
3. Config/DefaultInput.ini: Attack, MoveXY, LookXY mappings.
4. Later: dodge/block component or method.

## Risks
- Enhanced Input vs legacy BindAction mismatch.
- GameMode not set, so SpawnEntities may never run in PIE.

## Staged patch plan
1. R1 approval gate: confirm public API and ownership before edits.
2. R2 implementation slice: adjust one combat/input cluster only after approval.
3. R3 callsite slice: rewire callers and includes after R2 build passes.
4. R4 cleanup slice: remove dead includes only after UBT is green.

## Human approval gate
Medium refactor work must stop after this impact plan until a reviewer approves the staged patch boundary.

## Build
UBT YourProjectEditor Win64 Development after each slice.
